languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

languages.text: {n}Багрянец на миг затапливает синеву визоров Паскаля, вокс недовольно хрипит:{/n} "Статус подтвержден. Отклонение запроса признано корректным".
{n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."
languages.original_text: {n}Багрянец на миг затапливает синеву визоров Паскаля, вокс недовольно хрипит:{/n} "Статус подтвержден. Отклонение запроса признано корректным".

traits.locale_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."
{n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."
{n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

languages.text: {n}パスカルのバイザーが一瞬赤く染まる。彼のボイスから不快な音が漏れる。{/n}「状況確認。要求拒否は正当と認められた」
languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

languages.text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment färben sich Pasqals blaue Visoren blutrot. Ein verärgertes Kratzen ertönt aus seinem Vox:{/n} "Status bestätigt. Ablehnung der Anfrage als berechtigt bestätigt."
languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

traits.locale_text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment färben sich Pasqals blaue Visoren blutrot. Ein verärgertes Kratzen ertönt aus seinem Vox:{/n} "Status bestätigt. Ablehnung der Anfrage als berechtigt bestätigt."

languages.text: {n}Un fulgor carmesí eclipsa fugazmente el azul de los visores de Pasqal. Su voco emite una malhumorada respuesta:{/n} «Estado confirmado. Rechazo de la solicitud admitido como válido».
languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un fulgor carmesí eclipsa fugazmente el azul de los visores de Pasqal. Su voco emite una malhumorada respuesta:{/n} «Estado confirmado. Rechazo de la solicitud admitido como válido».

languages.text: {n}Bir anlığına Pasqal'ın vizörlerinin mavisini kızıllık kaplıyor. Voksundan hoşnutsuz bir hırıltı sızıyor.{/n} "Statü onaylandı. Talebin reddi geçerli olarak kabul edildi."
languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir anlığına Pasqal'ın vizörlerinin mavisini kızıllık kaplıyor. Voksundan hoşnutsuz bir hırıltı sızıyor.{/n} "Statü onaylandı. Talebin reddi geçerli olarak kabul edildi."

languages.text: {n}Un éclair écarlate vient brièvement envahir les viseurs autrement bleus de Pasqal.{/n} « Statut confirmé, {n}admet-il finalement d'une voix rauque et pleine de mécontentement.{/n} Rejet de la demande validé. »
languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un éclair écarlate vient brièvement envahir les viseurs autrement bleus de Pasqal.{/n} « Statut confirmé, {n}admet-il finalement d'une voix rauque et pleine de mécontentement.{/n} Rejet de la demande validé. »

languages.text: {n}刹那间，猩红之色淹没了帕斯卡目镜的蓝光。一声不满的嘶响自他的音阵渗出：{/n}“状态确认。拒绝请求被判定为有效。”
languages.original_text: {n}For an instant, crimson engulfs the blue of Pasqal's visors. A disgruntled rasp trickles from his vox:{/n} "Status confirmed. Rejection of request acknowledged as valid."

traits.locale_text: {n}刹那间，猩红之色淹没了帕斯卡目镜的蓝光。一声不满的嘶响自他的音阵渗出：{/n}“状态确认。拒绝请求被判定为有效。”
